notes: Laminated armored glass per MIL-PRF-32348. Float glass + polyvinyl butyral (PVB) interlayer construction. Density ~2.5 g/cm³, surface hardness ~600 HK. RHAe ~0.12-0.18 per mm vs KE. Provides small-arms protection at considerable thickness (50-100mm typical). Brittle outer layers spall on impact; PVB interlayer retains fragments. Used for vehicle windscreens (M-ATV, Stryker, JLTV). SpallCoeff high due to glass fragmentation.

source.methodology: RHAe from published ballistic test data on MIL-PRF-32348 laminated armored glass vs small arms. Surface hardness per glass industry standards.
